columns.extraction_plan: The regimen for Treatment Arm 1 (the experimental arm) is reported in the abstract and the methods section. Extract the regimen described for the "SOC + AAP" group. The abstract states: "SOC-alone with or without daily abiraterone acetate 1000 mg + prednisolone 5 mg (SOC + AAP)". Also, extract the regimen described for the "SOC + AAP" group. It states: "Patients allocated to the SOC + AAP group were also planned to receive abiraterone (1000 mg daily) with prednisolone (5 mg daily)".
